knockout.choose_replacement: Your active Pokemon is knocked out. You have to choose 1 of your benched Pokemon and switch it to your active spot.
knockout.choose_prizes: Congratulations! You may choose {prize_count} prize card(s) and put them into your hand.
retreat.choose_replacement: You retreated your active Pokemon. You should choose 1 of your benched Pokemon and switch it to your active spot.
retreat.discard_energy: You retreated your active Pokemon. You should discard some energies attached to it.
start.choose_active: The game start. You should choose 1 basic Pokemon and put it onto active spot.
start.choose_bench: Choose up to 5 Basic Pokemon to put on your bench (optional).
ability.charizard_ex.infernal_reign: You used the ability Infernal Reign. You can choose up to 3 Basic Fire Energy cards from your deck and attach them to your Pokemon in any way you like.
ability.charizard_ex.choose_energy_targe: Choose 1 of your Pokemon in play to attach the {card_name}.
item.great_ball: You used Great Ball. You may reveal a Pokemon you find there and put it into your hand.
item.nest_ball: You used Nest Ball. You can choose up to 1 basic Pokemon from your deck and put it onto your Bench.
item.super_rod: You used Super Rod. You can choose up to 3 in any combination of Pokemon and basic Energy cards from your discard pile back into your deck.
item.ultra_ball.discard: You used Ultra Ball. You should choose 2 cards in your hand to discard.
item.ultra_ball.search: You used Ultra Ball. You can choose up to 1 Pokemon from your deck and put it into your hand.
item.rare_candy.choose_stage2: You used Rare Candy. You should choose a stage 2 Pokemon in your hand for evolution.
item.rare_candy.choose_basic: You used Rare Candy. You should choose a basic Pokemon in play to evolve.
item.master_ball.discard: You used Master Ball. You should choose 1 card in your hand to discard.
item.master_ball.search: You used Master Ball. You can choose up to 1 Pokemon from your deck and put it into your hand.
item.electric_generator: You used Electric Generator. You may choose up to 2 Basic Lightning Energy cards from the top 5 cards of your deck.
item.electric_generator.choose_target: Choose 1 of your Benched Lightning Pokemon to attach {card_name} to.
item.energy_retrieval: You used Energy Retrieval. You may choose up to 2 Basic Energy cards from your discard pile.
item.lost_vacuum.discard: You used Lost Vacuum. You need to put 1 card from your hand in the Lost Zone.
item.lost_vacuum.choose_tool_stadium: You used Lost Vacuum. You can choose a Tool or a Stadium in play, and put it in the Lost Zone.
item.night_stretcher: You used Night Stretcher. Choose 1 Pokemon or Basic Energy card from your discard pile to put into your hand.
item.superior_energy_retrieval: You may choose up to 4 Basic Energy cards from your discard pile to add to your hand.
item.letter_of_encouragement: You used Letter of Encouragement. You may choose up to 3 Basic Energy cards from your deck to add to your hand.
item.hyper_aroma: You used Hyper Aroma. You may choose up to 3 Stage 1 Pokemon from your deck to reveal and add to your hand.
item.capturing_aroma.heads: Heads! You used Capturing Aroma. You can choose up to 1 Evolution Pokemon from your deck and put it into your hand.
item.capturing_aroma.tails: Tails! You used Capturing Aroma. You can choose up to 1 Basic Pokemon from your deck and put it into your hand.
item.earthen_vessel.discard: You used Earthen Vessel. Choose 1 card from your hand to discard.
item.earthen_vessel.search: You may choose up to 2 Basic Energy cards from your deck to add to your hand.
item.secret_box.discard: You used Secret Box. Choose 3 cards from your hand to discard.
item.secret_box.choose: You used Secret Box. Choose 1 {label} card from your deck to put into your hand.
item.buddy_buddy_poffin: You used Buddy Buddy Poffin. You can choose up to {count} Pokemon(s) from your deck.
supporter.bosss_orders: You used Boss's Orders. You should choose 1 of your opponent's benched Pokemon and switch it with their active Pokemon.
supporter.counter_catcher: You used Counter Catcher. You should choose 1 of your opponent's benched Pokemon and switch it with their active Pokemon.
supporter.professor_turos_scenario.choos: You used Professor Turo's Scenario. You should choose 1 of your Pokemon and put it into your hand.
supporter.professor_turos_scenario.repla: You used Professor Turo's Scenario. You should choose 1 of your benched Pokemon and switch it onto active spot.
supporter.arven.item: You used Arven. You can choose up to 1 Item card from your deck and put it into your hand.
supporter.arven.tool: You used Arven. You can choose up to 1 Tool card from your deck and put it into your hand.
supporter.jacq: You used Jacq. You may choose up to 2 Evolution Pokemon from your deck.
supporter.mortys_conviction: You used Morty's Conviction. Choose 1 card from your hand to discard.
supporter.serena.choose_effect: Choose an effect: (1) Discard 1-3 cards and draw to 5, or (2) Switch opponent's benched Pokemon V.
supporter.serena.discard: Choose 1 to {max_discard} cards from your hand to discard.
supporter.serena.choose_v: Choose 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokemon V to switch with their Active Pokemon.
supporter.ciphermaniacs_codebreaking.cho: Ciphermaniac's Codebreaking: choose 2 cards from your deck to put on top.
Choose which card to place on top of your deck.
tool.prime_catcher.choose_opponent_bench: You used Prime Catcher. Choose 1 of your opponent's benched Pokemon.
tool.prime_catcher.choose_your_bench: You used Prime Catcher. Choose 1 of your benched Pokemon and switch it to active spot.
tool.heavy_baton.move: Choose a Benched Pokemon to move {card_name} to.
stadium.artazon: You used Artazon. You may choose 1 Basic Pokemon without a Rule Box from your deck.
stadium.town_store: You used Town Store. Choose 1 Pokemon Tool card from your deck.
stadium.collapsed_stadium: Collapsed Stadium is now activated. Choose {discard_cnt} pokemon(s) in your bench to discard.
energy.jet_energy.switch: You attached Jet Energy to your Active Pokemon. Choose 1 of your Benched Pokemon.
ability.miraidon_ex.tandem_unit: You used the ability Tandem Unit. You may choose up to 2 Basic Lightning Pokemon from your deck.
ability.archeops.primal_turbo: You used the ability Primal Turbo. Choose up to 2 Special Energy cards from your deck.
ability.archeops.choose_target: Choose 1 of your Pokemon to attach {count} Special Energy card(s) to.
ability.squawkabilly_ex.motivate: You used Motivate. You may choose up to 2 Basic Energy cards from your discard pile.
ability.squawkabilly_ex.choose_target: Choose 1 of your Benched Pokemon to attach the selected energy cards to.
ability.lumineon_v.luminous_sign: You used the ability Luminous Sign. Choose up to 1 Supporter card from your deck.
ability.pidgeot_ex.quick_search: You used the ability Quick Search. Choose up to 1 card from your deck.
ability.forest_seal_stone.star_alchemy: You used the ability Star Alchemy. Choose up to 1 card from your deck.
ability.drakloak.recon_directive: You used Recon Directive. Choose 1 of two cards to put into your hand.
attack.rotom_v.scrap_short: You used Scrap Short. Choose Tool cards from your discard.
attack.munkidori.adrena_brain_source: Choose 1 of your Pokemon to move damage counters from.
attack.munkidori.adrena_brain_target: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokemon to move damage counters onto.
attack.dragapult_ex.phantom_dive: You used Phantom Dive. Put 1 damage counter on an opponent's benched Pokemon.
attack.fezandipiti_ex.cruel_arrow: You used Cruel Arrow. Put 10 damage on 1 of your opponent's Pokemon.
attack.flutter_mane.hex_hurl: You used Hex Hurl. Choose 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokemon.
attack.lugia_v.choose_target: Choose 1 of your Benched Pokemon to attach the Psychic Energy to.
attack.raichu_v.fast_charge: You used Fast Charge. Search your deck for a Lightning Energy card.
attack.raichu_v.dynamic_spark: You used Dynamic Spark. Discard Lightning Energy from your Pokemon.
attack.mew_ex.genome_hacking: You used Genome Hacking. Choose 1 of {opponent_name}'s attacks to copy.
attack.minccino.call_for_family: You used Call for Family. Choose up to {count} Pokemon(s) from your deck.
attack.pidgey.call_for_family: You used Call for Family. Choose up to {count} Pokemon(s) from your deck.
attack.jirachi.charge_energy: You used Charge Energy. Choose up to 2 Basic Energy cards.
attack.gholdengo_ex.make_it_rain: Make It Rain: discard Basic Energy from your hand.
attack.lumineon_v.aqua_return: You used Aqua Return. Choose 1 of your benched Pokemon to switch.
attack.iron_hands.replace_active: Your active Pokemon is knocked out. Choose a replacement.
supporter.kirlia.refinement: You used Refinement. Choose 1 card from your hand to discard.
event.weakness_applied: Weakness applied: damage doubled from {base_damage} to {final}.
event.resistance_applied: Resistance applied: damage reduced by {reduction} from {base_damage} to {final}.
event.confused_hurt: {pokemon} is Confused and hurt itself (coin flip: TAILS). Attack failed, 30 damage taken.
event.turn_switch: Turn switched to {player}. 1 card drawn from deck to hand.
event.mulligan_no_basic: {player} has no Basic Pokemon in opening hand. Revealing hand and shuffling back (Mulligan #{count}). Opponent may draw {count} extra card(s).
event.mulligan_extra_draw: {player} draws an extra card from opponent's mulligan ({n}/{total}).
event.mulligan_no_basic_short: {player} has no Basic Pokémon in hand! {opponent} may draw 1 extra card.
event.mulligan_opponent_draw: {player} draws 1 extra card (hidden until game start).
event.mulligan_reshuffle: {player} shuffles hand back into deck and draws 7 new cards. (Mulligan #{count})
